title: World and resident mouse selection remediation
summary: Make residents, structures, lanterns and relevant map objects selectable with visible feedback and inspector updates while fixing pointer-event layering.
acceptance: Clicking visible residents and map objects updates selectedEntityId and player inspector state
Selection feedback is visible in Pixi and reflected in HUD without UI-owned world mutation
Clicking empty map tiles gives localized inspect/feedback state rather than silent failure
Overlay pointer-events do not block map selection except over real UI controls
E2E or renderer tests cover selection in both windowed and fullscreen-equivalent viewport sizes

history.details: Implemented read-only resident, structure and empty-tile mouse selection with Pixi feedback, localized HUD inspection state, storage restore support and web-shell E2E coverage; pnpm quality, handoff validation, taskctl validate, git diff --check and web-shell E2E pass; pnpm test --filter web-shell remains an unsupported unit-runner command with equivalent E2E pass recorded.

verified: No blocking findings; resident, structure and empty-tile selection update presentation state only, HUD inspect feedback is localized, fixture count remains 40, and targeted HUD/fixture/geometry checks passed. Nonblocking note: E2E dispatches canvas pointer events directly and zh-CN numbered kiosk labels still read as handlers.
Task branch passed quality and web-shell E2E; independent reviewer Gate the 4th verified resident, structure and empty-tile selection with no blocking findings.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes

review.summary: No blocking findings; resident, structure and empty-tile selection update presentation state only, HUD inspect feedback is localized, fixture count remains 40, and targeted HUD/fixture/geometry checks passed. Nonblocking note: E2E dispatches canvas pointer events directly and zh-CN numbered kiosk labels still read as handlers.

integration.summary: Task branch passed quality and web-shell E2E; independent reviewer Gate the 4th verified resident, structure and empty-tile selection with no blocking findings.
